benefits.description: Significantly improved skin texture, smoothness, and softness. Skin clarity and reduced wrinkling comparable to people in their 30s.
Improved skin clarity and reduced wrinkling.
Injected into creaky knee, reported as fixed within a week.

protocol_notes: User is 57 years old, raised in San Diego. Follows meat-based/carnivore diet cyclically. Uses desiccated organs for 3 years. Also uses microneedling 1.5mm every 6-8 weeks for approximately 4 years. Cycle is 2 months on, 1 month off for the last year. Uses lidocaine cream for microneedling. Treats face, neck, chest, and forearms. Has been on current peptide routine for 1 year. GHK-Cu and Laennec on separate schedules.
